name: Spaghetti Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the 7-ounce package of spaghetti in a 2 1/2 quart bowl and drain.
2. Brown 1 pound of ground beef with 1 large onion, chopped, and 1 large green pepper.
3. Add the contents of 1 can tomato soup, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can water, and 1 cup shredded cheese to the meat mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Pour the meat sauce over the spaghetti in a baking pan.
5. Sprinkle with additional cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
